sections.title: Neonatal CCP Form Overview
learningObjectives: Identify the main components of the Neonatal CCP (Child Care Plan) form.
Understand the purpose of each section of the form for newborn care documentation.
Learn how to read and interpret the details shown in the form images.
Recognize the key fields that must be completed for accurate neonatal reporting.

subsections.title: Form Image – Page B
subsections.description: Zoomed‑in view of the second page of the Neonatal CCP form, showing field layouts and sample entries.

subsections.title: Form Image – Page A
subsections.description: Zoomed‑in view of the first page of the Neonatal CCP form, illustrating header information and introductory sections.
